message:
fix: Use --force flag to bypass platform checks in npm install

- Change --no-optional to --omit=optional (npm 10+ syntax)
- Add --force flag to bypass EBADPLATFORM errors for optional deps
- Platform-specific packages in lock file were causing install failures
  even with optional deps omitted

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -77,9 +77,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Install dependencies
         working-directory: crates/ruvector-gnn-node
-        run: npm install --ignore-scripts --no-optional
-        env:
-          npm_config_ignore_scripts: true
+        run: npm install --ignore-scripts --omit=optional --force
 
       - name: Build native module
         working-directory: crates/ruvector-gnn-node

@@ -79,9 +79,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Install dependencies

-        run: npm install --ignore-scripts --no-optional

+        run: npm install --ignore-scripts --omit=optional --force
 
       - name: Build native module
         working-directory: npm/packages/graph-node
